completed_tasks.name: Add 6 new Drizzle table definitions + extend XPSourceType + add database types
Extend Privacy Gate PRIVACY_MAP + update tests + add auto-validation test
Create Supabase schema + RLS migrations for 4 SYNCABLE tables
Write XP economy model document proving cap prevents hyperinflation

decisions.decision: Used Symbol.for('drizzle:Name') instead of _.name for Drizzle table name detection in auto-validation test
decisions.rationale: _.name was wrong — Drizzle uses Symbol.for('drizzle:Name') for table name access. Discovered during test execution.

decisions.decision: Used actual habitStore.ts XP values (fajr=50, others=15) in economy model instead of plan-assumed values (fajr=30, others=20)
decisions.rationale: Plan said 'use actual values from habitStore.ts'. Total 5-salah base XP is 110 either way.

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 12 to plan Friday Power-Ups phase
context_notes: Phase 11 fully complete and verified (7/7 must-haves). All v2.0 data layer foundation is in place — 19 Drizzle tables, 19 Privacy Gate entries, 4 Supabase migrations with buddy-pair RLS, XP economy model validated. Phase 12 (Friday Power-Ups) is next on the roadmap.
